name: MARINE PRODUCTS CORP
summary: Marine Products Corporation manufactures fiberglass motorized recreational powerboats sold through an independent dealer network of 192 domestic and 84 international dealers. Its two brands are Chaparral, offering sterndrive and outboard sport boats, and Robalo, offering outboard sport fishing boats. The company designs and manufactures boats at its Nashville, Georgia facility and sells into the pleasure boat and sport fishing boat markets.
